GENERIC_ERROR: An error occurred! Please check the inputs.
COMMAND_ERROR: An error occurred while executing the command.
NO_PERMISSION: You do not have sufficient permissions to use this command! (Required Level: {level})
ONLY_GUILD_ERROR: This feature can only be used in servers.
ONLY_AUTHOR_CAN_USE: Only the command author can interact with this menu!
NOT_YOUR_MENU: Only the command author can control this menu!
NOT_USER: Only the command author can control this menu 🚫
SLASH_ONLY: ⚠️ This command can only be used via Slash Commands (/).
CMD_DESC_HELP: Lists available commands and their descriptions.
CMD_DESC_SETTINGS: Changes bot settings (language, prefix) for the server.
CMD_DESC_STORE: Buy items to crush your opponents in duels.
CMD_DESC_LEADERBOARD: See the strongest fighters in the server.
CMD_DESC_KICK: Kicks a user from the server.
CMD_DESC_BAN: Bans a user from the server.
CMD_DESC_MUTE: Times out a user for a specific duration.
CMD_DESC_UNMUTE: Removes the timeout from a user.
CMD_DESC_CLEAR: Bulk deletes messages in a channel.
CMD_DESC_AUTOROLE: Automatically assigns a role to new members.
CMD_DESC_WEATHER: Shows detailed weather information for a city.
CMD_DESC_STATS: Shows technical data and live stats of the bot.
CMD_DESC_SAY: Makes the bot say a custom message.
CMD_DESC_SLANG: Enables or disables the bot's casual/slang mode.
CMD_DESC_EQUIP: Equips an item from your inventory.
CMD_DESC_REMOVEITEM: Permanently removes an item from the global store.
CMD_DESC_UNEQUIP: Unequips an item and returns it to your inventory.
CMD_DESC_OPENCHEST: Opens a chest from your inventory.
CMD_DESC_ADMINDROP: Drops a mysterious crate into the current channel.
CMD_DESC_DROPSYSTEM: Enables or disables the organic mystery crate system.
CMD_DESC_SETXPMULTIPLIER: Sets a custom XP gain multiplier for the server.
CMD_DESC_SETLEVELROLE: Configures an automatic role reward for reaching a level.
CMD_DESC_SETLEVELCHANNEL: Sets the channel for level-up announcements.
HELP_DESC: Available commands are listed below. Type `{prefix}command` for details.
HELP_MAIN_TEXT:
Hello! I am **Visually**, an advanced entertainment and moderation bot.

Use the menu below to explore my commands.

❓ **Support:** Use `/invite` to join our support server.

[Privacy Policy](https://github.com/xMrKerem/visually?tab=readme-ov-file#%EF%B8%8F-privacy-policy-gizlilik-politikas%C4%B1)
[Terms of Service](https://github.com/xMrKerem/visually?tab=readme-ov-file#%EF%B8%8F-terms-of-service-hizmet-%C5%9Fartlar%C4%B1)
CAT_MOD_DESC: Admin commands to manage the server.
CAT_SYS_DESC: Configure bot settings for the server.
SETTINGS_DESC: You can change Visually's settings for this server here.
PREFIX_MISSING: Please enter a new prefix. (e.g., !settings prefix .)
PREFIX_TOO_LONG: Prefix can be a maximum of 3 characters.
LOG_RESET: 🗑️ Log channel reset. Logging is disabled.
KICK_NO_USER: ⚠️ Please specify a user to kick.
KICK_FAIL: ❌ Could not kick the user. Check my role hierarchy.
BAN_NO_USER: ⚠️ Please specify a user to ban.
BAN_FAIL: ❌ Could not ban the user. Check my permissions.
UNBAN_INVALID_ID: ⚠️ Please enter a valid User ID (Numbers only).
UNBAN_FAIL: ❌ Could not unban. User might not be banned.
MUTE_NO_USER: ⚠️ Please specify a user to mute.
MUTE_TOO_LONG: ⚠️ Duration too long! Max limit is 28 days.
MUTE_FAIL: ❌ Failed to mute. Check my role hierarchy.
UNMUTE_NO_USER: ⚠️ Please specify a user to unmute.
CLEAR_INVALID: ⚠️ Please enter a number between 1 and 100.
CLEAR_FAIL: ❌ An error occurred (Messages might be older than 14 days).
WELCOME_INVALID_CHANNEL: ⚠️ Please mention a valid text channel.
WARN_INVALID_USAGE: ⚠️ Invalid usage! Use `/warn add`, `/warn list` or `/warn delete`.
WARN_FAIL_SELF: ⚠️ You cannot warn yourself or the bot!
WARN_NO_ID: ⚠️ Please specify the warning ID to delete (e.g., `A7X2`).
WARN_NOT_FOUND: ❌ No warning found with this ID.
WELCOME_CARD_COUNT: We are now {count} members with you!
GOODBYE_CARD_COUNT: We are now {count} members without you...
DUEL_QUE_FAIL: It's not your turn! Wait for your opponent.
NO_MANA_ULTRA: Not enough Mana! You need **100 Mana** for a Special Technique.
DUEL_SPECIAL_FAIL: **{attacker}** tried a Special Technique but failed to focus!
NO_MANA_HEAL: Not enough Mana! You need **40 Mana** to heal.
DUEL_HEAL: **{attacker}** drank a potion and restored **{heal}** HP.
DUEL_NOT_FOR_YOU: This request is not for you!
DUEL_MENTION_FAIL: Please mention a user or provide an ID to duel.
DUEL_WIN_PRIZE: 🤑 **<@{winner}>** emerges victorious! Gained **+{prize} Coins** and **+{xp} XP**!
DUEL_REVIVE_PHOENIX: ❤️‍🔥 **MIRACLE!** {player} has been revived by Phenex Tears!
EFFECT_REGEN_HEAL: 💚 **{player}** restored **{amount}** HP with their healing aura!
EFFECT_STUNNED: 💫 **{player}** is stunned and cannot move this turn!
STRIKE_LIFESTEAL: ✨ **{player}** drained **{amount}** HP with their holy sword!
STRIKE_SHOCK_DOT: ⚡ **{player}** was scorched by lightning and will continue to burn!
STRIKE_STEAL_ATTACK: 🤍 **{player}** halved the opponent's power and absorbed it!
MOVE_MULTI_HIT: ⚔️ **{player}** forged a new sword and dealt a DOUBLE STRIKE!
MOVE_IGNORE_DEFENSE: 🗡️ **{player}** bypassed the shield and struck directly at their soul!
MOVE_HOLLOW_PURPLE: 🟣 **HOLLOW: PURPLE!** Everything in its path was atomized!
MOVE_BREAK_GUARD: 🔴 **TECHNIQUE REVERSAL: RED!** The opponent's guard was shattered!
MOVE_CLEANSE_DEBUFFS: 💧 **{player}** cleansed all debuffs with Reverse Cursed Technique!
DUEL_BROKEN_ITEMS: ⚠️ <@{user}>, the intensity of the battle shattered/depleted these items: **{items}**
DUEL_SHIELD_BROKEN: 🛡️ 💥 <@{user}> **Your shield is broken!** Your next defeat will drop your rank.
STORE_MAIN_DESC: Buy items for a huge advantage in duels! Browse categories below.
STORE_MAIN_TEXT: Looking for an edge? I've got the best goods, if you've got the coin. 😎
STORE_SHIELD_DESC: Armors and energy shields to survive heavy hits.
STORE_SHIELD_TEXT: If you don't like getting beaten up, pick a shield.
STORE_EQUIP_DESC: Deadly tools to deal much more damage without mercy.
STORE_EQUIP_TEXT: The best defense is a good offense. Pick your weapon! 🔥
STORE_TECH_DESC: Enhancements to change the fate of the duel in seconds.
STORE_TECH_TEXT: You can't be a champion with just basic punches. Unlock a skill! 😎
STORE_HEAL_DESC: Potions you can use to restore your health.
STORE_CHEST_DESC: Try your luck! Browse chests that contain rare items.
STORE_COMMING_SOON: 🛠️ **Duel Store is coming soon!** Restocking shelves...
STORE_EMPTY_DESC: The merchants are out of stock. Please check back later!
NOT_USER_OR_ITEM: ❌ Error: User or item not found.
ENOUGH_BALANCE: ❌ **Insufficient Balance!** You don't have enough coins.
ITEM_OWNED: ❌ **Already Owned!** Permanent items cannot be bought twice.
INVENTORY_EMPTY: Your bag is empty! 🕸️ Go to the store (`/store`) and buy something.
SLASH_DESC_EQUIP: Item name or ID (e.g., Iron Sword)
EQUIP_NO_ARG: ⚠️ Please provide the name or ID of the item.
ITEM_NOT_FOUND_INV: ❌ Item not found in your inventory.
ITEM_DELETED_DB: ❌ Error: This item was removed from the database.
EQUIP_ERR: ❌ Error: Item cannot be equipped or has an invalid category.
SLASH_DESC_REMOVEITEM_ID: ID of the item to remove
REMOVE_NOT_FOUND: Item ID `{id}` could not be found.
REMOVE_FOOTER: No one can buy this item anymore.
UNEQUIP_NO_ARG: ❌ Please specify a slot (weapon, shield, tech, potion).
CHEST_OPEN_NO_ARG: Please enter the chest name or ID to open.
CHEST_NOT_IN_INV: That chest is not in your inventory.
CHEST_NOT_FOUND: Chest data not found in the store.
CHEST_OPEN_FAIL: Chest could not be opened. Try again later.
VOTE_CHEST_DESC: Vote for the bot on top.gg, then press check. Claim your Vote Chest!
VOTE_CHEST_PENDING: No unclaimed top.gg vote found. Vote first!
STORE_VOTE_CHECK_ERROR: System error occurred checking votes. Report to developer.
DROP_DESCRIPTION: Be the first to click the button below to open it. The contents are a total mystery...
NOT_RECEIVED_DROP_DESCRIPTION: No one opened the crate in time. It disappeared into the wind.
NO_DROP: This drop has expired or is no longer valid.
DROP_CLAIMED: Too late. Someone else already claimed this drop.
OPEN_XP_DROP: 🎉 <@{user}> opened the crate and earned **{amount} XP**!
PROMO_DROP_SERVER: 🎉 <@{user}> claimed **{item}**! The code was sent via DM.
PROMO_DROP_DM:
🎉 **Congratulations!** You won a **{item}** promo code.
Code: `{code}`
PROMO_DROP_DM_OFF: 🎉 <@{user}> won **{item}**, but I couldn't deliver the code because DMs are closed.
COIN_DROP: 🎉 <@{user}> opened the crate and earned **{amount} Coin**!
ADMINDROP_OPTION_TYPE: What should come out of the crate?
ADMINDROP_OPTION_ITEMNAME: What the promo code is for (promo only)
ADMINDROP_OPTION_CHANNEL: Which channel should receive the drop? Leave empty to use the current channel.
ADMINDROP_SLASH_ONLY: Please use this via slash (/) command.
ADMINDROP_MISSING_FIELDS: Drop type and value are required.
ADMINDROP_INVALID_AMOUNT: Enter a valid XP amount greater than 0.
ADMINDROP_SUCCESS: ✅ The drop has been successfully sent to <#{channel}>.
DROPSYSTEM_OPTION_STATUS: Should drops appear automatically in chat?
DROPSYSTEM_GUILD_ERROR: Server info could not be determined.
DROPSYSTEM_ENABLED_STATUS: ✅ **Enabled!** Up to 2 mystery crates can drop per day based on chat activity.
DROPSYSTEM_DISABLED_STATUS: ❌ **Disabled.** Organic drops stopped. Admins can still use `/admindrop`.
DAILY_COOLDOWN: ⏳ You already claimed your daily! Come back in **{hours}h {minutes}m**.
SETXPMULTIPLIER_INVALID: Valid XP multiplier could not be read.
SETXPMULTIPLIER_UPDATED:
XP multiplier set to **{multiplier}x**.
Users will now earn **{multiplier}x** XP.
SETLEVELROLE_OPTION_LEVEL: Level required to receive the role
SETLEVELROLE_INVALID: Valid level role config could not be read.
SETLEVELCHANNEL_OPTION_CHANNEL: Channel for level-up messages. Leave empty to reset.
SETLEVELCHANNEL_INVALID: Valid server could not be determined.
SETLEVELCHANNEL_STATUS_SET: Level-up messages will be sent to <#{channel}>.
SETLEVELCHANNEL_STATUS_RESET: Level-up channel reset. Messages will be sent via **DM**.
LEADERBOARD_EMPTY: 📭 No data in this category yet.
LOADING_DATA: Data is being collected and analyzed...
RAIN_CONTINUING: Precipitation is ongoing and will last about **{duration} mins**.
RAIN_STARTING: Precipitation starts in **{start} mins** and lasts **{duration} mins**.
NO_RAIN_EXPECTED: No precipitation expected for the next hour.
SERVER_INFO_ERROR: Server information could not be retrieved.
INVITE_DESC: Use the buttons below to invite me or join our support server.
SAY_NO_TEXT: ⚠️ Please enter a message to say.
SAY_RESTRICTED: 🛡️ Security: You cannot make the bot mention `@everyone` or `@here`!
AI_ERROR: My brain is a little fried right now... Try again later?
INVALID_SLANG_ARG: ❌ Please provide a valid option: `on` or `off`.
SLANG_ENABLED: 😎 **Slang Mode Enabled!** I'm taking off the tie. Expect casual, chill responses.
SLANG_DISABLED: 🧐 **Slang Mode Disabled.** I will now speak formally and politely.
